title: Home Roadmap
content: Course overview, roadmap, syllabus, climate tech, smart cities, curriculum

title: About This Course
content: Philosophy, target audience, computer science, software engineering, climate goals

title: Career Paths
content: Jobs, carbon accounting, hardware engineering, data science, IoT, smart grid

title: Project Ideas
content: Portfolio projects, WattTime API, open source, GIS mapping, DIY sensors

title: Chapter 1: Deep History of Climate Science
content: Eunice Foote, Fourier, Keeling Curve, radiative forcing, Milankovitch cycles

title: Chapter 2: Understanding the Climate System
content: Energy budget, albedo effect, tipping points, carbon cycle, feedback loops

title: Chapter 3: The Urban Challenge
content: Urban heat island, sprawl, 15-minute city, concrete emissions, Jevons paradox induced demand

title: Chapter 4: What Are Smart Cities?
content: IoT architecture, edge computing, perception, network block, Sidewalk Labs Toronto privacy

title: Chapter 5: AI Fundamentals for Climate
content: PINNs, physics-informed neural networks, CNN computer vision, reinforcement learning RL, data sparsity

title: Chapter 6: AI vs Traditional Modeling
content: NWP, GraphCast, downscaling GANs, weather prediction forecasting

title: Chapter 7: Optimizing the Smart Grid
content: Duck Curve, Virtual Power Plants VPP, V2G Vehicle to Grid, demand response

title: Chapter 8: Smart Buildings & Efficiency
content: BMS, HVAC optimization, deep energy retrofits, thermal mass, occupancy sensing

title: Chapter 9: Intelligent Transportation
content: MaaS Mobility as a Service, autonomous vehicles AV, traffic lights computer vision, micromobility

title: Chapter 10: Disaster Resilience
content: Adaptation vs mitigation, flood digital twins, mesh networking communications, wildfire drone detection

title: Chapter 11: Precision Agriculture
content: Methane, fertilizer N2O, drone spraying, digital twins of farms, vertical farming

title: Chapter 12: Water Strategy & Ocean Tech
content: NRW Non-Revenue Water leaks, acoustic sensors, desalination reverse osmosis bounds, blue carbon

title: Chapter 13: Circular Economy
content: Take-make-waste, Digital Product Passports DPP, AI optical sorting MRF, e-waste server farms

title: Chapter 14: Hyper-local Air Quality
content: PM2.5, environmental justice, mobile IoT sensing, macro vs micro networks

title: Chapter 15: Urban Digital Twins
content: Cityverse, spatial computing, what-if predictive simulation, IoT integration API

title: Chapter 16: Climate Finance & Markets
content: VCM Voluntary Carbon Markets, MRV satellite verification, catalytic capital FOAK valley of death

title: Chapter 17: Governance & Ethics
content: Techno-solutionism, algorithmic bias, privacy by design edge surveillance, geoengineering solar SRM

title: Chapter 18: Careers in Climate Tech
content: Green software engineering carbon-aware, transferable skills, embedded systems IoT

title: Chapter 19: Hands-On Projects
content: WattTime API, ESP32 PurpleAir sensor DIY, QGIS openstreetmap GIS, open source contributing

title: Chapter 20: The Frontier of Tech
content: DAC Direct Air Capture, nuclear fusion tokamaks, Space-based Solar Power SBSP, conclusion
